mapper.sql: id, projectId, assetId, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, disabled, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into af_industry_asset_project_relation
projectId,
assetId,
effectiveFrom,
effectiveTo,
disabled,
createBy,
createTime,
updateBy,
updateTime,
#{projectId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{assetId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update af_industry_asset_project_relation
projectId = #{projectId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
assetId = #{assetId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update af_industry_asset_project_relation set projectId = #{projectId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, assetId = #{assetId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT}, createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

select * from af_industry_asset_project_relation
id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
projectId = #{projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
assetId = #{assetId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND

updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND

assetId = #{assetId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND

id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
projectId = #{model.projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
assetId = #{model.assetId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
effectiveFrom = #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveTo = #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by id desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

projectId = #{model.projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
